Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a brand booking order from a customer for Teh Tarik Balang

userDate.description: The custom date scheduled for the event

userTime.description: The custom time scheduled for the event

selectedDistance.description: The resolved driving distance in kilometers

qty12L.description: Quantity of the 12 Litre jars of Teh Tarik

qty8L.description: Quantity of the 8 Litre jars of Teh Tarik

subtotalWater.description: Subtotal cost of the tea jars

grandTotal.description: The final aggregate sum total cost of the order

status.description: The current workflow status of the order

createdAt.description: When the record was written (Server Timestamp)

updatedAt.description: When the record was last modified (Server Timestamp)

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Represents a specific date block and live balang capacity status

date.description: Calendar date key used by the deployed website, e.g. 15 JUN 2026

capacityUnits.description: Maximum balang capacity for this date

totalFleetLimit.description: Alias of capacityUnits for legacy dashboards

totalRequestsReceived.description: Total unique order/hold records counted for this date

confirmedPaidOrders.description: Number of confirmed or paid orders for this date

pendingHoldOrders.description: Number of active pending website holds for this date

isFull.description: True if the slot limits are strictly reached for this date

holdMinutes.description: Minutes that pending unpaid website orders are counted as active holds

countPendingHolds.description: Whether pending website orders count against capacity

sourceCount.description: Number of unique source records counted

lastUpdated.description: When the booking capacity document was last recalculated

/bookings/{bookingId}.description: Calendar dates capacity / fully-booked slots registry
